name: Banco Modal S.A.
summary: Banco Modal S.A. provides various banking and financial products and services in Brazil. The company offers corporate banking services; and investment banking services comprising financial advisory, and debt and equity capital market services. It also sells and trades in currency exchange products, derivatives, term and other deposits, public and private securities, and brokerage and funding products and local fixed income markets; and CDB, LC, LCI, LCA, NTN, and other products. In addition, the company provides digital banking services; and invests in the real estate sector. Banco Modal S.A. was founded in 1995 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
